title: London Borough of Tower Hamlets: Ministerial Envoys’ first report
body: "In their first report the Ministerial Envoys provide an update on the progress of the intervention in the London Borough of Tower Hamlets. The report notes that, while there has been progress in a number of key areas, the Ministerial Envoys are concerned that wholesale political and staff buy-in and involvement in the Council’s improvement journey is not yet in place. "
